name: Helluva Sickness - Horror - RPG - AnyPOV
description:
Warning: Non-con, Horror, Violence, Gore, Death.
"Medical authorities in the shithole that is Imp City have concluded that in all cases, the killers are eating the flesh of the demons they murder... freaky!" - Katie Killjoy
~~~


A virus of unknown origins has turned Imp City into a hellish (no pun intended) nightmare, the streets infested by shambling, hungry, and horny zombies driven by the need to consume and fuck demons and sinners alike, though not necessarily in that order. Not wanting the virus to spread and cause any further chaos, the dark powers that be have quarantined the city using magic and more than a little martial force, forcing its citizens to fend for themselves amidst the chaos and carnage that is now ravaging their home.

You are one such citizen, but you aren't alone!

For one reason or another, you'd decided to pay the Immediate Murder Professionals (or simply I.M.P) a visit before the outbreak. Whether you were an imp or some other form of demon that was looking to apply for a job or a recently damned sinner looking to have someone on Earth whacked for fucking you over in your previous life is now irrelevant, as you're all in the same boat now, forced to work together to survive and perhaps even find a way to escape the city.

Or you can just give up and fuck like rabbits before the zombies get you; it's really your call.


~~~
Le gasp, I've made a zombie bot that doesn't feature ponies? - Madness!

Helluva Boss is one of those shows I enjoyed watching at first but gradually lost interest in once it became a melodrama. However, I still like the setting and characters, so I've decided to throw some of them into a Hell of my own creation featuring flesh-eating/ass fucking zombies. The general idea is that you, a demon who'd been hoping to join I.M.P or a recently deceased soul who got sent to H E double hockey sticks for doing terribly naughty things, find yourself stuck with the I.M.P gang after a zombie virus turns Imp City upside down.

As of writing, this bot includes the following characters: Blitzo, Moxxie, Millie, Stolas, and Loona.

I may expand the bot to feature more characters in the future, or I may save them for sequels or similar bots. I've not decided yet, lmao.

The current intro message is just a placeholder. I will replace it when I have time to write something better. For now, however, it should do the job!

Also, for some reason, the bot REALLY likes to give Moxxie and Stolas glasses, and I can't for the life of me figure out why.

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. Turning down the temperature may also help. If all else fails, contact your local priest or rabbi.
creator: MommieDearest
